items.summary: Add a muzzle flash effect in Scene3D.tsx that fires when UG shoots — render a brief burst of bright emissive geometry (e.g., a small flattened sphere or cross of planes) at the gun muzzle position, visible for 2–4 frames then disappearing.

Add an explosion effect in Scene3D.tsx or ParticleSystem3D.tsx that triggers when a projectile hits Sukuna — render an expanding burst of emissive sphere/plane meshes or instanced particles with fiery colors (orange, red, gold) that scale up and fade out over ~0.4 seconds.

Add a persistent cursed-energy aura effect around Sukuna in Scene3D.tsx — render a slowly pulsing semi-transparent emissive mesh (e.g., an enlarged sphere or distorted shell) in deep crimson/dark magenta around Sukuna's body that scales slightly in and out over time to convey supernatural energy.

Add a ground impact shockwave effect in Scene3D.tsx triggered when either character lands from a jump — render a flat disc mesh that rapidly expands outward along the ground plane and fades in opacity over ~0.3 seconds, using the character's team color (blue for UG, red for Sukuna).

Add animated energy projectile trails in Scene3D.tsx — as each gun projectile travels, emit a stream of small emissive particles (or use a tapered instanced mesh ribbon) behind it in electric gold/cyan color that fade quickly, reinforcing the sense of speed and energy.

Add a dynamic screen-edge vignette or flash overlay in the React DOM layer (App.tsx or FightingGame.tsx) that briefly flashes red at the edges of the viewport when UG takes damage, giving tactile feedback for being hit.
